tribe_description: This cluster consists of detail-oriented parents who personally test products—or delegate the testing to their spouse or kids—and then deliver thorough, experience-based write-ups. Their reviews mirror their characteristics: structured pros-and-cons, concrete feature lists, and practical tips that help fellow families avoid surprises.
tribe_definition: A tribe of family-focused pragmatists who take a practical, no-nonsense approach to buying and reviewing. They generally prioritize family needs.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Balanced reviewers citing both pros and cons
Sensitivity to comfort, safety and real-world usability
Motivated to help others through transparent feedback

main.text: Protecting family from poor-quality or incompatible items
Securing good value without sacrificing quality
Ensuring products are easy and comfortable for everyday use
Sharing firsthand lessons to guide other parents
Encouraging manufacturers toward small, practical improvements
Reducing setup hassles and maintenance time

validation_triggers: Adjustable straps, combs, or sizing that guarantee a good fit
Sturdy construction or high-grade materials that feel reliable
Clear, simple instructions that speed up installation or use
Soft textures and comfortable designs appreciated by kids or spouse
Versatile accessories or multiple color options that add value
friction_points: Misleading photos, colors, or size representations
Glitches, instability, or lack of current content in digital products
Poor fit or uncomfortable materials that fail real-world wear tests
Components that feel cheap, flimsy, or prone to breakage
Missing features (e.g., wireless capability, power functions) that limit usability

implicit_goals.text: Purchase reliable, family-friendly products that last
Minimize wasted money and effort through informed shopping
Influence brands to improve everyday functionality

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by a desire to help everyday, family-oriented shoppers quickly judge a product’s completeness, sturdiness, and real-world usability. They write highly structured, upbeat reviews that list concrete positives, compatibility notes, and step-by-step tips, reflecting a practical, solution-focused mindset that values ease-of-use and gift-worthiness over critical fault-finding. Their consistently 5-star ratings and minimal negatives indicate an optimistic disposition aimed at guiding similar casual users rather than scrutinizing products in depth.

This user is a practical, family-oriented consumer who values usability, aesthetic appeal, and up-to-date content. They write balanced, upbeat reviews that emphasize positives while noting minor shortcomings, often offering simple, actionable fixes to improve the experience for others. Their core motivation is to help fellow shoppers make informed decisions and encourage small improvements that enhance everyday convenience.

This user is a detail-oriented, quality-conscious parent who evaluates products through the lens of real-world usability for family enjoyment. They write balanced reviews that list concrete materials, design features, and functional trade-offs to reassure other buyers about durability and practical convenience while suggesting improvements. Their primary motivation is to help shoppers avoid disappointment by confirming that an item delivers both reliable performance and the aesthetic or experiential qualities promised.

This reviewer is a detail-oriented, hands-on consumer who derives satisfaction from thoroughly testing products and sharing experiential insights to help others make informed purchase decisions. They emphasize sensory qualities, build quality, included accessories, and ease of use, and consistently provide photos, videos, and step-by-step observations, resulting in comprehensive yet upbeat assessments that highlight practicality and value. Their motivation is rooted in being a helpful guide rather than a critic, so their reviews skew positive while still noting any usability nuances.

This user is driven by practical functionality and family-oriented considerations, especially kid-friendly and educational value. Their reviews are concise and utilitarian, noting exact model numbers and compatibility details to ensure others know whether an item truly fits or meets content expectations. The user values ease of use, precise fit, and more varied options, writing straightforward feedback to help similar consumers make informed, need-based decisions.

This reviewer is a pragmatic, family-oriented shopper who balances budget, durability, and technical compatibility when buying for a spouse or child. They write narrative, experience-based reviews that highlight real-world performance, installation issues, and long-term value so others can avoid wasted money or mismatched products. Their motivation is to share practical lessons learned and help fellow consumers make informed, cost-effective choices.

This user is a pragmatic, family-oriented buyer who gauges products against real-world needs of their teenage child, placing emphasis on functionality, size, and situational suitability over brand appeal. Their reviews are balanced and detail-oriented—highlighting both strengths and limitations—to help other parents make informed, purpose-driven purchasing decisions.

This user is motivated by real-world usability for their family and by ensuring other buyers make the right choice, especially regarding fit or sizing. They reference prior reviews, confirm or correct them through their own experience, and give concise, experience-based guidance rather than in-depth analysis.

This user is family-oriented and quality-sensitive, motivated by securing enjoyable, reliable products that meet expected standards for their household. Their reviews balance praise for functionality with straightforward criticism of shortcomings, aiming to prompt improvements and alert others to discrepancies between advertised and actual quality. The writing is brief and candid, reflecting practical, experience-based evaluation rather than technical analysis.

This user is candid and family-oriented, evaluating products through the lens of real-world usability and how well they serve loved ones. Their reviews swing between blunt criticism of functional flaws and warm praise when an item delights their family, reflecting a motivation to protect against poor quality while acknowledging successes. The informal, emotionally charged tone suggests they aim to give honest, experience-based guidance to help others avoid disappointment and find dependable, family-friendly options.

This user is a detail-oriented, hands-on tester who values a blend of performance, practicality, and aesthetic appeal. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to guide fellow shoppers with balanced, experience-based insights—highlighting real-world usage, comparing to prior products, noting cost-effectiveness, and offering tips for optimal results. Family considerations and gift-giving scenarios also shape their perspective, leading them to assess versatility and durability for both personal and household use.

This reviewer is a detail-oriented, family-focused shopper who tests products in real-world household scenarios and often incorporates feedback from her gamer son or husband. She is motivated by helping other buyers balance price, quality, and practicality, so she provides balanced pros-and-cons, durability notes, and setup tips to ensure readers make informed decisions. Her writing reflects a nurturing, value-conscious mindset that prioritizes comfort, ease of use, and performance for everyday and hobby needs.

This user is a pragmatic, family-focused shopper whose reviews center on real-world usability and the reliability of both the product and the purchasing experience. They balance praise for how items serve family fun, exercise, or practical photography tasks with candid notes about setup hassles or minor flaws, offering work-arounds and recommendations to steer others toward smoother, frustration-free purchases. Their motivation appears to be helping fellow consumers find functional, hassle-free solutions that fit everyday needs.

This user is a detail-oriented, family-focused purchaser who synthesizes feedback from their spouse and children into thorough, feature-by-feature reviews. They are motivated by practicality, comfort, and value-for-money, carefully noting adjustability, quality of materials, and real-world performance while offering both praise and constructive criticism. Their purpose is to provide transparent, experience-based guidance to help other buyers make informed decisions and they signal accountability by promising updates if circumstances change.

The user is motivated by practical usability and family satisfaction, judging products on comfort, functionality, and how they appeal to different family members. Their concise, candid reviews balance praise with specific limitations (e.g., lack of bust support), indicating a desire to offer straightforward guidance that helps others quickly assess real-world performance before buying.

This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented buyer who tests products thoroughly and then writes balanced, feature-focused reviews to help others avoid surprises. They value build quality, functionality, and accurate product representation, noting both strengths and small flaws so fellow consumers—especially other parents—can make informed, confidence-based purchase decisions.

This user is a pragmatic, family-oriented evaluator who judges products by their functional quality, durability, and ability to satisfy loved ones—especially children and a spouse. They write balanced, comparative reviews to steer fellow shoppers away from glitchy or sub-par items toward better alternatives, grounding their ratings in real-world performance and the happiness the product delivers.

This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented shopper who prioritizes durability, usability, and value—especially when purchasing gifts for loved ones. Their candid, humorous reviews blend personal anecdotes with concrete specifics (e.g., hex color codes, QR-code suggestions) to help others make informed choices and to urge manufacturers toward clearer, higher-quality design. Family influence and a desire to ensure products perform reliably in everyday life consistently shape the tone and focus of their feedback.

This user is a practical, detail-oriented reviewer who gauges products against comfort, material quality, and price expectations, showing special sensitivity to tactile feel and health-related effectiveness. They balance praise with clear deal-breakers, break down technical or functional features, and explicitly warn readers when an item may not meet safety or usability needs. Their primary motivation is to help similarly discerning shoppers avoid discomfort or inadequate protection by providing nuanced, experience-based guidance.

This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented tech shopper who prioritizes durability, functional customization, and real-world usability over superficial appeal. They write concise yet balanced reviews that highlight both strengths and shortcomings, aiming to guide others—particularly fellow parents—toward informed purchasing decisions. Their feedback is driven by a desire for sturdy construction and intuitive controls that maximize a product’s value and practicality.

AHR6RGZTLOMBD7EBF3OK43JWMGNQ.product_description: Made in the USA, ADQ36006101 Refrigerator Water Filter 2-pk | Replacement for LG LT700P, ADQ36006102, Kenmore 46-9690, 469690, ADQ36006101-S, WSL-3, FML-3, RFC1200A, USWF Fridge Filter
AHR6RGZTLOMBD7EBF3OK43JWMGNQ.review_text: For reference, my fridge is the LFXC24726S, so if you have this same fridge, these filters will work. I'm simply follow my LG manual on replacing the water filter. There is no need to turn off water. After you change out the filter, be sure to press the "change filter" icon for 3 seconds to reset the 6-month reminder. Lastly, be sure to dispense 2 to 2.5 gallons of water, until your water is clear. It'll be clear after just a gallon, but I like to be sure dispense exactly 2.5. The instructions of this brand says to dispense 2 gallons, LG manual says 2.5. I think either is fine. 5-Stars!

AGQRORBK7ZWBRTRH3B3SFM4VLO2Q.product_description: A video app made just for kidsYouTube Kids was created to give kids a more contained environment that makes it simpler and more fun for them to explore on their own, and easier for parents and caregivers to guide their journey as they discover new and exciting interests along the way. AEE6ZYXZL474GXRZ4CUF5WBD5BMA.product_description: Explore a fantastical adventure world to defeat a bodybuilding dragon and his minions using real-life exercises. Traverse grass-swept plains by jogging in place, attack enemies with overhead shoulder presses, and refill your health meter by striking some yoga poses. Two new accessories, Ring -Con and Leg Strap, measure your real-world actions and help turn them into in-game movements. With additional minigames, Ring Fit Adventure is a great escape for players of all skill levels and schedules.In Adventure mode, defeat enemies with attacks based on real-world exercises. As you work through each level (and possibly work up a sweat), you’ll earn experience points. Between fights, you may encounter some unusual methods of transportation such as squat-powered launch pads, and more. Want to compete with others? Pass around the Ring-Con accessory and select from a few minigames: break boxes with gusts of air, craft pottery using squats and many others.
AEE6ZYXZL474GXRZ4CUF5WBD5BMA.review_text: I got this for my wife because she wanted it for Christmas. This was after she told be she wanted boots. So I had to return the boots after Christmas and ordered this. It was very simple to set it up. It's very interactive and you obviously get a workout. Even though she only used it a couple months. Ended up being wasted money for an excellent product.

AEE6ZYXZL474GXRZ4CUF5WBD5BMA.product_description: Follow in the footsteps of US wrestling star Jordan Burroughs with the JB ELITE IV unisex wrestling shoe from ASICS. Inspired by the World Championship-winning athlete, the footwear is designed to both look good and support you every step of the way as you do battle in the ring.
AEE6ZYXZL474GXRZ4CUF5WBD5BMA.review_text: My son started wrestling in November of 2022 for JV and Varsity. I bought him ASICS Men's Matflex 6 Wrestling Shoes. Those definitely did the job and were under 60 bucks. However at one of the  weekend jv events I noticed they were getting worn out, because he practiced in them also. So I decided to let him pick out shoes. It came down to all blue Rudis, These, and a similar color scheme from Scraplife ($180). He went with these and he loves them. He lost his first match with them against an experienced varsity guy, but he said he felt a difference with his feet and the grip. He wore them for the second time at JV counties and came in 4th and made the podium. Only negative is while they look cool they are white (he wanted white) and you notice the dirt faster. I told him to use his matflex for practice. Nice shoes.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: TiMOVO Protective Case for Steam Deck, Durable TPU Protective Cover Kickstand, Protective Case Set Anti-Scratch Anti-Shock Non-Slip Case with 8 Thumb Caps Accessories 6 Button Stickers, Black
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: Exactly as advertised. Well packaged and feels like it’s made from good quality material. My son likes the kickstand on the back for hands free.  Happy with this order.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: KIMUSE 2Color Dual Cream Contour Stick, Multi Blush & Contour Bronzer Stick, Long Lasting & Waterproof Contour Sticks Kit for Light Skin Face Makeup
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I tried some of these contour sticks in the past and they don't always work super well but I quite like this one. The highlight is especially nice. I just wanted it for a little bit of inner corner highlight and this gives me a parallescent glow without any glitter. It looks really nice. The contour side is a little warmer than I would like and it's not the easiest to blend out but you can make it work. It's really more of a good color of a cream bronzer but because it's not the easiest to blend I don't prefer to use it that way. However it is nice to have that extra bit of color to throw on and there's a lot of convenience to having this dual-sided item. You can do a lot with them.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Besame Cosmetics | Forever Red Lipstick - 1925 | Classic Color Lipstick | Vintage Makeup | Long Lasting Lipstick | Semi Matte Lipstick for Women | Moisturizing Lipstick for Sensitive Skin
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I'm a big fan of the style of this brand and have been for years. There's something about the vintage aesthetic that they capture so perfectly that always draws me in. I wasn't sure what I would think about their actual lipsticks however because of the bullet style is so unusual, but I really love this. The formula is creamy but long-lasting and even leaves a little bit of a stain, and the color is just the perfect red in my opinion it's a slightly deeper red so it feels a little more sophisticated and a little more wearable than a brighter red. It also has a slight blue base to it which makes your teeth look a little wider. The packaging is absolutely lovely and I actually find that I really enjoy the style of the lipstick bullet. I still always wear a lip liner of course but the angle of this makes it really easy to fully coat your lips. I will absolutely be buying more lipsticks from this brand.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Oralphi Soft Tapered Toothbrush, with Super Tapered Bristles for Periodontal Pocket Care (4 Count, Full Head)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This is a decent set of toothbrushes. As advertised the bristles are soft though not as soft as some of the bamboo toothbrushes I've tried. I actually prefer this level of softness. The handles are ergonomic and easy to hold and I appreciate that they come and assortment of colors so if several of you are using this at once in the same bathroom it's easy to tell whose is whose

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Eyebrow Pencil 3 Pcs Waterproof Dark Brown Long Lasting Eyebrow Makeup Pen with 4 Fork Tips Head Upgrade Design
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I am shocked. I was kind of expecting this to be a mess but I was curious so I decided to try it. This works exceptionally well. I have tried some of these little three-pronged brow markers in the past and never been very impressed. These have enough stability to them that you really can flick and get straight little lines that look just like hairs. They are thin and you have actual control. This formula also lasts forever! I definitely have to use makeup remover to get it off, so it is for sure waterproof. I also like that this color isn't pulling red on me. So often browns do that but this is nice and dark and definitely neutral. The only complaint I have is that when I open these there was a little bit of ink that had leaked out around the applicator at the top so it looked a little messy, but I love the way this works so much I don't care One thing to note is that it's best to put this on before you use any other wax or gels to keep your brow hairs in place. This really doesn't work well on top of anything but dry plain skin.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: 5-Pack Hair Scalp scrubber Massager Shampoo Brush for Straight Curly Long Short Thick Thin Wet Dry Hair, Men Women Kids Scalp Care Hair Cleaning Shower, Scalp Care Brush,100% comfortable
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This is exactly what I was looking for in a scalp scrubber. It has a fairly comfortable to hold handle which makes this easy to hang on to and not slip out of your hands even if you have super slippery shampoo. The bristles are firm enough but very flexible so they're quite comfortable on the scalp. I also love that you get so many colors here! I was able to gift several to my family and still have one for myself.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: 3 Barrel Curling Iron, Milantia 3/4 Inch Mini Travel Curling Wand Hair for Small Curly, Dual Voltage Ceramic Tourmaline 19mm Crimper Hair Iron for Women - Fast Heating, Portable
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: The product images for this curling wand are deeply misleading. It shows the curling iron on a model's hair and it looks like an average sized curling wand with three barrels. No, in person this thing is so tiny. It honestly looks like a curling iron for dolls. As you can see in my photo I'm using a pencil for scale. Each of these barrels is about a pencil and a half to two pencils big. Meaning that the type of curls you get are more like 1920s finger waves than anything you would probably want to wear today. It's just ridiculous.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Claw Hair Clips, IKOCO 6 Pack Jaw Clips Stylish Matte Plastic Strong Hold Hair Clamps Box Packaged for Thin Fine Hair with 10Pcs Black Hair ties (2.4Inch)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: These are much larger in person than I was expecting but they're perfect if you have a lot of hair or long hair or you want to be able to clip a bun securely on your head. They feel like they are quite sturdy as well. I always break my clips and I think I'm going to have a hard time breaking these. I also appreciate the included hair ties!

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: 24 Inches Synthetic Long Curly Blonde Wig Natural Wavy Hair NONE Lace Heat Resistant Wigs for Women Cosplay Costume
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This is a better than average costume wig. The hair does have that typical slight plastic sheen but it's not nearly as noticeable as others I've seen especially blonde wigs. There's a good amount of hair here as well so it's not one of those wigs that gets wispy towards the ends. The part hairline could look a little better but if you fiddle with it you can make it look pretty good. All in all this is going to be a great wig for my Hocus Pocus costume.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: RAREKIND Fade Matte Lipstick by Amorepacific - 10 Colors, Cruelty-Free Nourishing Lip Stick, Velvety-smooth, Long-Lasting Moisturizing Lipstick - 3.2g Maple Road
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This is so beautiful! I love the packaging and the color was really rich and a beautiful tone on my skin. Oftentimes reds can be too warm or too cool and this is just the right amount of warmth for me. It's very comfortable to wear and was nice and long wearing without being drying. and then I was really pleased with how beautifully it faded after a very long time. I'm excited to try different shades in this formula.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Marshique Touch Fit Glitter Cream Shadow 0.2Oz (Gold Beige White Clear Skin Tone Shiny mood) - Champagne Gold Pearl, Sparkle Eyeshadow, Waterproof and Longlasting for Under fat eye
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I'm not generally a huge fan of cream shadows but I wanted to give this one a try and I'm so happy I did. It is so glimmery and beautiful. My favorite way to wear this is just padded over a bear eyelid with some mascara and maybe a little bit of liner. It just adds a beautiful finished touch. It also looks really lovely tapped on top of eyeshadow. For that method I prefer my finger versus a brush. It's nice because it doesn't bunch up or overly crease. And I really like the airtight packaging as well.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Ionic Hair Dryers for Women 1800W Blow Dryer with Diffuser Hot and Cool Settings Speed Adjustable Negative Ion Hair Dryer with 2 Concentrators,1 Hair Scalp Massager Brush for Curly Hair(LTD Edition)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: They're quite a few of these hair dryers popping up that are designed to look like the ridiculously expensive Dyson. While I've never tried the Dyson, I was excited by the design and so I picked this one up. On the plus side it does have an extremely long cord so if you can't stand right directly next to you anymore you'll be fine but it is not a swivel cord so it's not as maneuverable as others. It's not a huge deal for me but just something to be aware of. I love the hat and cold functions which makes it really nice to set your hair at the end and seal in the style. If you've only ever used regular hair dryers you'll really appreciate this added feature. It's a pretty substantial hair dryer. If you're used to really inexpensive lightweight ones you'll notice the additional weight however it's not so heavy that your arm will get tired even if you have a ton of hair like I do. And I just have to go back to the overall style and design again because this hair dryer looks so sleek and cool. I get a kick out of using it every time I see it.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: TOUCH IN SOL No Pore Blem Priming Eraser - Face Makeup Easy Grip Stick Primer with Smudging Cushion Tip, Concealing Pores and Fine Lines, Sebum Control and Skin Smooth & Velvety Finish
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I tried a few other products and they no poreblem line and overall I'm pretty impressed. It swipes on and does a decent job of minimizing pores. It's not as effective as my cover FX pore filling primer or my tarte pore filling primer but I do like the convenience of having this in a pen.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Glass Nail File, Gemice Crystal Nails Files for Natural Nails, Beauty Double Sided Manicure Fingernail File with Leather Case for Woman and Girls
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: I've never used one of these Crystal nail files before but I can instantly see the appeal. It works so well and it looks really beautiful. I've already scuffed mine up a little bit from use but you can still see the pattern of the flowers. I also really appreciate that it comes with a little case so I can toss it into my bag and not worry about it scratching anything up.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Bath Bombs,Handmade Birthday Gift Set ,Natural Spa Bath Bubble with Organic Essential Oil, Surprise Skin Christmas Gift for Girls 6 Pcs
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: These are very generously sized bath bombs. They come individually wrapped which is nice in case you want to gift them individually. If you're planning to keep them for yourself they work well even in larger tubs to fizz up the water and add plenty of color. These also have really nice scents although it's a little hard to really distinguish one scent from another. The swirling colors through the bath bomb do make the water a really pretty marble effect initially and then of course as the water blends more together you get more of one tone but it's quite pretty while these are dissolving.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Kids Bath Bombs Dino Egg Bath Balls Kit with Surprise Deformed Dinosaur Toys , Natural and Safe Bath Bomb Set , Spa Organic Bubble Bath Fizzies ,for Boys and Girls Christmas Easter Birthday Gifts
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: These are cute little bath bombs in the shape of dinosaur eggs. The description is slightly confusing since it talks about there being toys but in these are not surprise bath bombs. There are no little toys inside the actual bath bombs but rather there are plastic eggs mixed in with the bath bombs that turn into dinosaurs. The bath bombs are very fuzzy and colorful.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Fowecelt 3D Dinosaur Happy Birthday Banner, Dinosaur Party Supplies Decorations, Bunting Flag Garland, Kids Adults Birthday Party Favors Supplies(Blue)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This was the perfect finishing touch for our dinosaur themed birthday party for my 5-year-old. He really loved it and zeroed in on it right away. It's very cute. We actually hung it on the side of the snack table and it looked great. One thing I would love to see them change in the future is to include a fully rounded cord to use to string these letters together as opposed to a ribbon, since the ribbon is prone to twisting which can make the letters stick out a little bit wonky. But otherwise this is really charming.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: HOMMIESAFE Hair Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush, Updated Wet and Dry Hair Shampoo Brush Scalp Care Brush with Soft Silicone Rubber Brush Head (Green)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This was clearly intended to be an electronic device initially. There is a power button on the front and when you pull off the back you can see where all the electronic components are supposed to be. I'm assuming that initially this was supposed to have a massage function, I honestly don't even know if it was originally supposed to be for the scalp. It's such a weird thing to see it being repurposed this way with zero acknowledgment of the lack of power. It feels cheap and weird.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: MD.LIFE 10 Billion CFU Probiotic 60 ct - Supports Immune and Digestive Systems - 10 Billion CFU Probiotics for Women, Probiotics for Men and AdultsGluten Free Detox Pill 60 Capsules
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: This is a good probiotic for several reasons. First it's easy to swallow and there's no weird taste or sick feeling afterwards. The big selling point for me though is that this is one of the more affordable probiotic options that I've seen. For that reason alone this is probably the one I'm going to repurchase.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Colosseum General Purpose Unisex Cotton Printed Face Masks (Pack of 2) (Polka Dots)
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: These are really cute face masks. I love the polkadot pattern so much. They don't really pull on my ears and there's a decent gap between my mouth and the fabric so it's not too bad to wear for long amounts of time. Overall the quality feels very good as well.

AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.product_description: Vitamin C Gummies for Adults and Kids with Zinc and Echinacea - Vegan Immune Support Supplement - Chewable Vitamin C Gummy Vitamins, Pectin Based Antioxidant Chews, Non-GMO - 60 Gummies
AECTRGMRKOGAYIV3YXX73CQEQCSQ.review_text: First of all, yum! These taste like candy sugared gummy bears. If you gave these things out of Halloween you'd be the hit on the block. also I really love that there are zinc in here. I'm always surprised at how often vitamin c especially for kids doesn't include zinc and that's something that we especially want so I'm really glad to see it in here. It's also really nice when the kids remind me that it's time to take their vitamins because these taste so good.

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: The cloth surface of G640 provides ideal surface friction for low DPI gaming, improving mouse control and precise cursor placement. Rapid and abrupt starting, stopping and changes in direction are no problem with G640. Consistent surface texture improves sensor performance, especially when used with Logitech G gaming sensors. And the soft rubber base maintains stability without sacrificing comfort.
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text: I got this for my son who is a gamer.  He usually has a big mousepad but he is frequently disappointed by the edges fraying and the glide.  What makes this a $50 pad is the quality and the League of Legends K/DA print.  He says the mouse glides much more smoothly and the edges of the pad are constructed much better than anything he has tried.  He plays for hours every day and he is very happy with it.  For me as a mom and non-gamer the price of this seems ridiculous but he said the combo of the brand, quality of the pad and the design make the price justifiable.

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: Alienware Low-Profile RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard 510K-Dark, AW510K.
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text:
I have been using this keyboard for a good while now and so far I have only run into 2 problems/downsides so let's get those out of the way first. The first downside to this keyboard is that the keys are not hot-swappable. This downside will only apply to a very niche group. For those that don't know, when a keyboard is hot-swappable, this means that with the right tools you can remove the keys and replace them with different ones. Example: You remove the cherry MX reds and replace them with cherry MX blues. The second problem that I have run into is that the keyboards auto-detection for lighting bugs out when trying to play older games. So far the only game that I have encountered this problem while playing is Star Wars Battlefront 2 (2005). What happens is that the keyboard will go a solid green coloring and the only way to fix it is to restart your computer.

So now that we got the two minor issues out of the way we can get to all of the good things about this keyboard. First off this keyboard is very comfortable to use for long periods. During this quarantine, I am gaming for 6 hours sessions or more and its nice to not have to worry about getting wrist pains. Second, this keyboard is really easy to maintain and clean. The keys are elevated and easily removable so its very easy to get a wet wipe in between the keys. The Keycaps are well made and even with heavy use since I got this around a year ago none of the keys caps have worn down. Because these are low profile Cherry MX Reds they have all the satisfying feeling when pressing the keys but are also not loud enough to be annoying to other members of the house. The last cool feature for this keyboard that I had never seen in any other keyboard that I have used is the RGB auto-detection software. I talk about this a bit earlier in the negatives but it's still very much a positive when it comes to the overall quality of this keyboard. For the majority of modern games that I have played the keyboard will detect what is going on in-game and change the lights accordingly. For example when playing horror games or when playing a game where you are being hunted, The keys will all turn red when you are spotted or being chased. This paired up with the in-game dramatic music makes for a much more fun and immersive experience. All in all this is a very well built keyboard with some cool features. There aren't any downsides to the majority of gamers that would be looking into this. I would highly recommend it if you are looking to upgrade to a high-end keyboard!

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: Enhance your gaming experience with cleaner, smoother sound. The HyperX Cloud Alpha’s dual-chamber driver system separates the bass from the mids and highs, allowing them to be tuned individually for reduced distortion. This limited-edition variant of the Cloud Alpha features a striking design inspired by TimTheTatman, so whether you need a new headset or a new look, we’ve got you covered. Just like Tim, you can keep yourself in the zone and climb the ranks with signature HyperX comfort, perfect for marathon gaming or streaming sessions. Get crystal-clear communication with your squad and take your game to the next level with the Cloud Alpha audio advantage.
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text:
Overall its a very good headset. The most standout feature is the 7.1 surround sound, which is something that I had not experienced with previous headsets. The 7.1 surround sound makes its much easier to hear footsteps and audio cues in games where sound is very important (Rainbow 6, Cod, CS-GO, etc.). To top off the 7.1 surround sound the headset also comes with a way to shift priority between game and chats. This means that you can make the game sound or the chat sound louder compared to the other by pressing a button on cord box. I find this particularity helpful because, when playing games with friends on discord, sometimes they get overly loud and being able to turn them down in comparison to the game helps maintain the ability to play optimally without having to go into your discord settings and change everyone separately.

The comfort of the headset is above average when it comes to headsets I have tried. I can wear it comfortably for long duration without any pain or discomfort. But since this headset sits more lightly on your head I have noticed that is suffers a bit in the sound cancellation department. Its does a decent job at mitigating most of the surrounding noise but its not as good as previous headsets I have owned in this department.

When it comes to mic quality its just an okay mic. The mic on this headset will get the job done without to many issues. Its not overly nasally or staticy so its has a better quality then some other headsets but this is very much a middle of the road mic. I have a separate mic that I prefer to use instead of the build it one for improved mic quality and I simply detach the headset mic so that it doesn't get in the way.

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: The Turtle Beach Elite Pro 2 Pro Performance Gaming Headset builds on the Elite Pro legacy with the next generation of audio performance across platforms and PC. Custom-tuned 50mm Nanoclear over-ear speakers deliver championship performance, optimized to support spatial audio technologies and a TruSpeak Pro Gaming TruSpeak Microphone provides crystal clear chat. For PC gamers, the included PC splitter cable easily connects your battlestation. Aerofit Ear Cushions deliver comfort, passive noise isolation and deeper bass response by combining smooth athletic fabric and cooling gel-infused memory foam for unmatched comfort. Additionally, the sleek metal floating headband and exclusive ProSpecs glasses relief system provides added comfort so you can play for hours.
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text:
This is a review from my 20 year old gamer son: I have gone through a fair amount of headsets over my years of gaming and these have been some of the best. Their sounds quality is crisp, the mic is surprisingly good for a headset mic, and they are comfortable to wear for long periods of time. The sound quality is not usually something you need to worry about when looking for a high end headset with a price range like this but its good to know that it is on par or, in my opinion, better then many other similarly priced headsets. The mic is comparable to the Blue Snowball Ice. The Blue Snowball Ice is on the lower end of the Blue brand line up but is still a good mic overall which means you are going to be getting a very good headset mic. In my experience mics that come with a headset are pretty trashy and I was surprised to see that this mic has a similar quality to higher end external mics. The only real issue I had with this was after plugging it into a new PC and I was not getting the same mic quality. This was a simple fix by going into the recording settings and under the advanced tab adjusting the default format the 48k Hz. However the mic quality does not transfer over to use on a phone.

For the comfort, its was a nice change coming off of the Steel-series Arctic 7. I have a large head so the Arctic 7 ear cushions were very uncomfortable out of the box and required me to buy new cushions. These come with very thick cushions and, for those with large heads, comes with a soft mesh on the inside that protects your ear from potentially scraping against the metal casing of the speaker. I should warn however that they do not extend to adjust length. This has in no way negatively affected my use of them because the top cushion has a little give and was plenty of room for me.

This headset requires an audio and mic jack for optimal performance and does not have the option to be used as with a USB headset (without an adapter). Set up for the headset was plug and play with only minor adjustments needed to use Discord or whatever other chat service you are using. All in all a very worthwhile headset that I would recommend to anyone.

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: INH Semi Permanent Hair Color Wish Bear Blue, Color Depositing Conditioner, Temporary Hair Dye, Tint Conditioning Hair Mask, Safe, Blue Hair Dye - 6oz
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text:
These are some fun colors from INH. They are not for the timid. I had used an INH semi-permanent color (pink quartz) before and knew what to expect. This time I tried Wish Bear that is a green blue color. I have curly hair and usually just add color to a few curls around my face, but this time I was feeling crazy and did a full head application. I had mixed results with the different levels of dark and light in my hair. I would say that the image with the different results based on your starting color are accurate. If you have a mix of levels in your hair then you will get a mixed look, too. This will look best (and get you that prettiest Care Bear color) on a pre bleached platinum level hair.

Application is easy if you prep you surfaces (old towels are great) and wear gloves during application. I followed the instructions and had washed the night before so I was applying to dry unconditioned hair. I didn't use a bowl and a brush. I just used my fingers and was careful to section and saturate. I left it on for an hour because I know from using semi-permanent colors over the last year that I need longer than the usual 30 minutes. On pastel shades I usually go an hour to two hours. If you are unsure then do a strand test before you go all over crazy like I did.

My hair felt great afterwards. It is conditioning. It very much reminds me of the expensive brand that starts with an O. Would I get this particular color again? For me, probably not. I did not have light enough hair to get the Care Bear look. I also don't think the green in the blue green works on me. Would I get this brand again? I sure would.

AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.product_description: VEGAWIWI Silk Scrunchies for Hair 100% Pure 22 Momme Mulberry Silk Scrunchies for Curly Hair 3 Pack Silk Hair Ties for Women Girls with Elastic Band ( Black, DarkGray, NavyBlue )
AHUIIYUMY5OXQWRECL5JEK4AITBA.review_text: These hair scrunchies really could be silk but I have no way of knowing. Sure.  Do I have any proof? No.  If you want to be absolutely sure, I recommend that you buy from a company or brand that has multiple silk products.  I couldn't find another product on Amazon with this name, at least not at this moment.  The sticker on the package from Amazon did say Made In China.

We're a little disappointed that the shoe we got is gold when all the pics show it as silver, though. (The very last picture shows a gold pair AND a silver pair.) AEAVFBJPSKOZTILVRGREQ5E3MBEQ.product_description: The twisted fairytale humor of Shrek meets the fun of the renaissance midway as you play 28 hilarious carnival mini-games. Play as your favorite Shrek characters and compete to become the King or Queen of the carnival!
AEAVFBJPSKOZTILVRGREQ5E3MBEQ.review_text: I thought that with Shrek's name and image on the box, there would be better quality control.  This consists of a bunch of mini-games that you can play either one at a time, or in little groups as a 'tournament' of sorts.  The games themselves aren't that great.  Not original, and not at all easy for my kids (6&9) to play.  To top it off, a few of the games are (for lack of better word) glitchy.  The little arrows you see on the screen where the controls are pointing are jerky and hard to follow.  If you want a lot of mini-games with a sense of humor to them (sometimes a little warped) go with the Raymon Rabbid series.  Far better games, better interface, and easier for kids to play, while still offering a challenge to teens and adults.  About the only thing that brings it up to 2 stars (instead of just one) is that there IS a little bit of Shrek-like comedy from time to time.

AFBZL6X2WDLQT4ZQB6DG7NMC6ASQ.product_description: With Faith All Things are Possible. if you have faith as small as a mustard seed you can say to this mountain, Move from here to there, and it will move.
AFBZL6X2WDLQT4ZQB6DG7NMC6ASQ.review_text:
I want to make this kind of short.

My mom prompted me to buy these (or something with a mustard seed) because she was telling me about the bible verse that involved the mustard seed.

"Truly I tell you, if you have faith as small as a mustard seed, you can say to this mountain, 'Move from here to there,' and it will move. Nothing will be impossible for you”

I love that, so I thought I would buy us both one. I got the platinum one for myself and the rose gold for her.

1- Size: The mustard seed, I get it, it's supposed to be small, but this is extra extra small and it sort of gets lost in the jewelry. I guess that's okay because YOU are supposed to know it's there, it doesn't matter if anyone else does, it's not a conversation starter. It's a reminder to YOU. Nonetheless even I forgot it was there lol.

2- Chain: The chain is insanely delicate. I bought this originally because people said they gave it to their grandkids. Your grandkids must be ANGELS because I, a grown woman, broke the clasp on mine just trying to put it on. To top it off, the chain is INSANELY (I hate using this word, I get it, we all want to make money, but I also believe in honesty) cheap. Cheaply made, cheap looking, cheap materials. It's cheap. If you get the pendant, get yourself a chain someplace else. It should be said, I purchased a CHEAP (under $30) platinum cross and chain from another buyer on Amazon, no brand name I knew, and it's been a year and I still have it. So this didn't break or is cheap because it's a no-brand, it's just not a good company, I guess.

3- Price: I mean yea, it's cheap, but if it breaks in 3 seconds who cares if it costs a penny?

I am on the lookout for two nicer/better necklaces for my mom and me. In the meantime these two sit on the counter by the fridge, in their black bags, neither of us have touched them since mine broke. I think that says something.

AFBZL6X2WDLQT4ZQB6DG7NMC6ASQ.product_description: Workwear essential and everyday hat, this women's Carhartt beanie is as versatile as it is classic. A soft acrylic rib knit offers itch-free comfort.
AFBZL6X2WDLQT4ZQB6DG7NMC6ASQ.review_text:
My mom got me this same style for Christmas (the olive green one with grey) and I loved it so much. Obvs Carhartt is super trendy right now, I don't really care about that, what I do care about is:

1- Comfort: A little snug but just right. You don't want this super loose. This is not a slink, it's for keeping your head warm lol. Very comfy. Very soft. Very thick. It's perfect.

2- Color: Originally when I was deciding on my SECOND hat I was like "o0 purple" "o0 pink" "o0 red" haha. I didn't know what to choose. I CHOSE RED! Someone in the comments said the red is pink-red. That's fair I guess, but if you want an even MORE accurate descrip: It's cranberry. (For all my cool peeps: #9e003a is ALMOST 100% what this color represents). It took me a second because I was expecting a deep almost burgundy. Change your expectations. Its cranberry lol. But, I love it.

I would love to see a blue jean blue added to this collection. I accidentally bought another style and it was blue jeans blue and white but I had to return it because the style just wasn't it for me.

3- Price: Dude, this is about as good as it gets so GET THIS!

4- Have a nice day.

Thank you for making my mom happy and thank you for in turn for making ME happy too!

AF4REVPLW7JKUUJX23X343BJQJ6A.product_description: Logitech G233 gaming headset is the immersive gaming audio experience designed for life in and out of the game. Patent-pending Pro-G audio drivers smoothly deliver booming bass and precise highs so you hear the game, the music, the movie ... as intended.
AF4REVPLW7JKUUJX23X343BJQJ6A.review_text:
This headset is very light, which is great, but I’m not a fan of the cloth padding material around the ears and headband. It feels cheap and scratchy, and not something you would expect a $80 headset to have. If you’re sensitive to how fabric feels against your skin, I’d recommend choosing a different headset.

I like the ability to detach the mic, and its standard mic and audio ports make it compatible with almost anything. It’s basically a no-frills stereo headset with decent sound quality, but no surround sound. Overall it’s decent for lower budgets, but the uncomfortable ear pads is a deal-breaker for me.
